channel.title: Eric Spencer - Computer Science Portfolio on Eric Spencer
channel.description: Recent content in Eric Spencer - Computer Science Portfolio on Eric Spencer

item.title: Resilient
item.description: A statically-typed compiled language for safety-critical embedded systems, with Z3-verified contracts and self-healing runtime blocks

item.title: Rubik's Snake — Formally Verified
item.description: Coq (Rocq) and TLA+ specifications of the Rubik's Snake state space — 4^23 configurations, formally

item.title: tunes2tube
item.description: A local macOS app that drops a cover image and audio files in, and gives you back MP3s with the cover embedded as ID3v2 artwork — no account, no upload.

item.title: Claude Architect Quiz
item.description: Free flashcards and practice quiz for the Anthropic Claude Certified Architect exam.

item.title: ChatTLA+ Dataset
item.description: The dataset release for the ChatTLA+ paper — SFT corpus and benchmark for TLA+ spec generation, posted anonymized for blind review.

item.title: COMP 388 LLM Homework
item.description: Two homeworks from Loyola's special-topics LLMs class: prompting GPT-2 and comparing base vs instruction-tuned Qwen.

item.title: ChatTLA+
item.description: Presentation on using LLMs for TLA+ formal specification generation and verification.

item.title: Founder
item.description: Photo editing app built because nothing on the App Store was doing what I wanted.

item.title: Family Guy Gag Scraper
item.description: Scripts to scrape and catalog cutaway gags from Family Guy episodes.

item.title: BrightBet.tech
item.description: An AI-powered trade and prediction analysis platform built for HackIllinois 2026.

item.title: Reinforcement Learning Connect 4 Bot
item.description: An AI agent that learns to play Connect 4 through self-play reinforcement learning.

item.title: Loyola ITS RAG Bot
item.description: A voice-first RAG chatbot trained on Loyola's ITS knowledge base, built after two years of answering the same tickets.

item.title: Sneaker Run
item.description: An endless runner game with a sneaker theme, built with vanilla JavaScript and HTML5 Canvas.

item.title: Yeat Large Language Model
item.description: Fine tuning GPT-2 to talk like Yeat

item.title: RVC Artist Model
item.description: Voice conversion models for different artists using Retrieval-based Voice Conversion (RVC).

item.title: Fortnite OneShot
item.description: A playable browser-based Fortnite game generated by Claude Opus 4.5.

item.title: Cubed Pack Solver
item.description: A solver for packing 54 T-tetracubes into a 6x6x6 cube using Knuth's Dancing Links algorithm.

item.title: OneShot HM2016
item.description: A browser-based HITMAN-style first-person shooter built with HTML5 Canvas.

item.title: Advent of Code 2025
item.description: My Advent of Code 2025 attempt in Python. Got six days in before life took over.

item.title: Reverse Engineering Xoroshiro128++
item.description: Reverse engineering the xoroshiro128++ PRNG to recover internal state and predict outputs.

item.title: TLA+ Model of a Walk-In Oven
item.description: A formal TLA+ specification of a walk-in industrial oven with a focus on safety interlocks.

item.title: Founder
item.description: No-code eCommerce storefronts that aren't hidden behind a monthly subscription.

item.title: Goldbach Conjecture
item.description: Verifying the Goldbach Conjecture by brute force for every even number up to 1 billion.

item.title: TLA+ Model of a Laptop
item.description: A formal TLA+ specification modeling a laptop's power states, battery, lid, thermals, and auto-suspend.

item.title: BioOps Web
item.description: A React + Tailwind starter site for BioOps, an environmental awareness initiative.

item.title: Great Chicago Fire Digital Exhibit
item.description: An interactive digital exhibit about the Great Chicago Fire, built with SvelteKit and D3.js.

item.title: TLA+ Model of Dexcom G7
item.description: A formal TLA+ specification of the Dexcom G7 continuous glucose monitor's behavior and safety properties.

item.title: Auto Decode
item.description: Browser-based tool that automatically detects and decodes strings across multiple encoding formats.

item.title: UDP server (binary)
item.description: UDP send/receive utilities for binary payloads.

item.title: Founder
item.description: Lightweight AI-assisted stock analysis and portfolio helper for hobby traders.

item.title: ITCH Protocol Parser
item.description: A parser for the NASDAQ ITCH protocol with a UDP server for binary data streams.

item.title: Founder
item.description: Independent software studio shipping small, subscription-free tools built entirely in the United States.

item.title: Conway's Game of Life
item.description: Interactive implementation of Conway's Game of Life with preset patterns

item.title: TLA+ Formal Generation
item.description: Early exploratory repo for generating TLA+ specs from natural-language requirements with an LLM, with a TLC harness wired in. The scaffold that eventually grew into ChatTLA+.

item.title: Git Key Guardian
item.description: Protect sensitive keys from accidentally being uploaded to your git history at any point.

item.title: GluCoPilot
item.description: AI Glucose Insights App

item.title: Facebook Clone
item.description: A clone of the Facebook UI built as a web development class project.

item.title: Training an LLM on ASCII
item.description: A toy transformer that reads pyfiglet ASCII art and tries to spit the original word back out. Calling it an LLM is generous.

item.title: mc-carspot: Online Parking Simulation in Rust
item.description: A tiny Rust simulator for the online parking-spot problem with switching costs.

item.title: iOS Soundboard
item.description: A SwiftUI soundboard app I built in an afternoon to get more comfortable with iOS.

item.title: Windows Design Website
item.description:
Homepage of the website as imagined it would look like as a Windows 7 homepage.

Website loading…

item.title: Chess.com Stats Display
item.description: A small Flask app that pulls Chess.com's public API and graphs your rating history.

item.title: Gesture
item.description: A proof of concept Jarvis-style macOS controller that takes voice commands and hand gestures from the webcam.

item.title: ITS Service Desk Technician
item.description: Provide frontline technical support and access management.

item.title: Researcher
item.description: Research on TLA+ and fine-tuning open-source LLMs for formal methods.

item.title: AIs Talking Philosophy
item.description: A toy where two local Ollama models loop on consciousness until one of them gives up

item.title: How to tell if written work is AI
item.description: Easily tell if something is AI using these obvious giveaways

item.title: llmjammer
item.description: Obfuscator for public Python code to confuse LLMs

item.title: AI OS
item.description: An experimental AI-centric operating system exploring tight integration between AI and system-level operations.

item.title: Connect 4 Game Engine
item.description: A Chess engine-esque Connect 4 analyzer

item.title: Chess Game
item.description: Interactive chess game with AI opponent

item.title: BlackJack Game
item.description: Play BlackJack with fake money

item.title: GitHub pfp Generator
item.description:
Generate a default GitHub profile picture below, Generate a new profile as much as you please.

item.title: Software Engineering Intern
item.description: Full-stack implementations and interactive claims dashboard for B2B SaaS portal.

item.title: Web Based TLA+ Microwave
item.description: An interactive microwave in the browser to learn TLA+

item.title: coq Presentation
item.description: The formal methods language

item.title: Software Engineer
item.description: Implemented a web-based visualization and demo application for TLA+ using Spring Boot and Vaadin.

item.title: Search Engine
item.description: A barebones Google search experience

item.title: YouTube Downloader
item.description: Locally hosted youtube downloader for mp3 and mp4s

item.title: AI Sign Language Interpreter
item.description: A Simple Sign Language Recognition App using OpenCV

item.title: flatten-repo VSC Extension
item.description: A VS Code extension I made when I kept running out of Copilot credits — flattens a repo into one .txt file you can paste into a free LLM.

item.title: Dexcom Navbar Icon Mac OS
item.description: View your Dexcom number in your Mac OS Navigation Bar

item.description: Ran every time I open a terminal

item.description: My older website

item.title: TDX Window Blocker
item.description: Custom Safari Script for TDX Popups

item.title: CTA Transit Tracker
item.description: A real-time bus and train tracking system built during Loyola's Hackathon.

item.title: MLB Hall of Fame Predictor
item.description: A scikit-learn decision tree that guesses whether a current MLB player would get voted into Cooperstown, built for the Google Cloud x MLB hackathon.

item.title: Terminal GPT
item.description: A small Python CLI for chatting with OpenAI and running English-to-Bash commands from the terminal. The thing I actually open when I want to talk to a model.

item.title: Software Engineering Intern
item.description: Backend automation and workflow optimization using Google Apps Script.

item.title: COMP322 Final Project Reflection
item.description:
Eric Spencer + Matthew Caballero
December 14, 2024
COMP 322/422 Reflection

Reflections on HealthUp!

Abstract

HealthUp! is an application focused on bettering a user’s information about their health. Users can log nutritional information of foods and track their workouts. We wanted to develop this app to support our passion for healthy living.

Repository (without keys)

GitHub Repository

If you attempt to download and run the app, see the bolded text in “Testing & Iterative Design.” The iOS version of the app does not work.

item.description: A movie recommendation website developed as part of the Loyola AI Club's Fall 2024 project.

item.description: A Java program to find overlapping free time for up to four people.

item.description: Computer Science major with an Information Systems minor.

item.title: Eric Spencer - AI & Technology
item.description: Eric Spencer - Building AI projects and open source tools. Loyola University Chicago alum (BS Computer Science, 2026) focused on machine learning, web development, and innovation.

item.title: Eric Spencer - Developer | AI Builder | Open Source
item.description: Eric Spencer is a full-stack developer and AI builder creating innovative software solutions. Explore his tech stack, projects, and work.

item.title: Who is Eric Spencer? - AI Builder & Developer
item.description: Learn about Eric Spencer - an AI builder and developer based in Chicago creating AI projects, open source tools, and innovative software solutions.
